SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
 N = No 
 9 = Not applicable 
 X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is only available 2008–2010. The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from 
information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting Plan Benefit Package information. For those plans that did not report, the value of this
